assistant_summary: {"findings":[{"title":"[P1] Invoke a runnable entry point for background extraction","body":"When `decisions.auto_extract` is enabled, this worker is launched with `python -m entirecontext.cli ...`, but `entirecontext.cli` is a package with no `__main__.py` in this tree, so the child process exits immediately (`uv run python -m entirecontext.cli --help` already fails that way). In any repo that turns this feature on, decision extraction never runs and the hook silently leaves behind a stale PID file instead of creating decisions.","confidence_score":0.99,"priority":1,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext/src/entirecontext/hooks/decision_hooks.py","line_range":{"start":231,"end":233}}},{"title":"[P2] Don't drop extraction when another session is being processed","body":"This early return makes extraction lossy whenever two qualifying sessions end close together. If session A starts the `worker-decision` process and session B ends before A finishes, session B is skipped here, no retry is scheduled, and `decisions_extracted` is never set for B because this logic only runs on `SessionEnd`. In repos with overlapping agent sessions, some sessions' decisions will never be extracted.","confidence_score":0.92,"priority":2,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext/src/entirecontext/hooks/decision_hooks.py","line_range":{"start":226,"end":227}}},{"title":"[P2] Scan all fresh decisions instead of only the newest 50","body":"The auto-stale hook only checks `limit=50`, and `list_decisions()` orders by `updated_at DESC`, so once a repository has more than 50 fresh decisions the older ones are never revisited. That means long-lived decisions can become stale and stay marked `fresh` forever, which breaks the main SessionEnd automation for active repos.","confidence_score":0.9,"priority":2,"code_location":{"absolute_file_path":"/Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext/src/entirecontext/hooks/decision_hooks.py","line_range":{"start":32,"end":32}}}],"overall_correctness":"patch is incorrect","overall_explanation":"The new decision hook automation has at least one broken execution path and two cases where it silently misses work. As written, enabling auto extraction or relying on auto stale checks can leave decision state incomplete or incorrect.","overall_confidence_score":0.96}
